name: Radium Resources Corp.
summary: Radium Resources Corp. acquires, explores, and develops diamond projects in kimberlite rich areas in Central and Southern Canada. The company operates properties in the Fort-a-la-Corne and Shear Surround areas of southern Saskatchewan near the Canada-United States border. The company was formerly known as Kimber-X Resources Corporation and changed its name to Radium Resources Corp. in December 2007. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Wilmington, Delaware.
